programme.title: US Troop Withdrawal: A Turning Point For Europe?
programme.desc: It's not going great for Europe: militarily and economically, the continent is under growing pressure. And the US President is showing little appetite to help out. Donald Trump stays true to his motto: America First. Can Europe stand on its own? Our guests: Brandon Bohrn (Bertelsmann Stiftung), Gustav Gressel (military expert), Rachel Tausendfreund (German Council on Foreign Relations)

programme.title: I Am Fine But
programme.desc: A year spent as a volunteer in Berlin. For Angeli from Cameroon, this is the first big trip of his life. How does voluntary service in another country shape a young person?

programme.title: Montenegro: Crackdown On Crime And Clans
programme.desc: Montenegro is on the cusp of a historical renewal. Reformers are struggling with remnants of the old regime after a transition of power in 2020 +++ Luxury tourists head to Mallorca due to Iran war.

programme.title: Ordering With Apps: Why Gig Workers Are Suffering
programme.desc: Having food delivered through the tap of an app is part of everyday life. Even care workers can be gig workers now. Algorithms decide who gets the job. What does this mean for the labor market and consumers?

programme.title: A Woman In The Well Of Death: India's Bravest Stunt Driver
programme.desc: Rehana Khan is one of India's few female stunt drivers. She tours the country's fairgrounds, drawing crowds as she rips around the 'Well of Death” on her motorcycle - a massive wooden structure with vertical walls. This danger is only compounded by the difficulty in making ends meet for her family as India's travelling fairs struggle to compete with modern entertainment.

programme.title: Saksi
programme.desc: Brings up-to-the-minute news, relentlessly delivering breaking stories and covering live reports.

programme.title: Maka 2
programme.desc: It is a youth-oriented drama series that follows the lives of six high school students enrolled in the Arts & Performance section of public school, Douglas Mac Arthur High School for the Arts aka. MAKA.

programme.title: Resibo: Walang Lusot Ang May Atraso
programme.desc: A public service program aimed at giving a voice to the public's grievances and complaints, exposing wrongdoing, and providing concrete resolutions.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: Encantadia Chronicles: Sang'gre
programme.desc: The series is a spin-off to the Philippine television fantasy drama series, Encantadia.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: The Magic Crane
programme.desc: While the world of martial arts is in probably the most peaceful period for a long while, the Tien Lung Tribe suddenly emerges with a strong military presence as if it were to conquer the warring society. As its presence begin to stir up everyone in the scene, the Court decides to order the leader of the Six Fan Gates – Cho Hung to gather the ten most esteemed tribes for a conference in an attempt to prevent any chaos or unnecessary warfare in the community...

programme.title: With Or Without You
programme.desc: Police detective Ming loses his gun during a drunken binge and attempts to recover it while romancing PR girl Tweedy. That's the gist of the first two-thirds of the slackly-paced story, which is enlivened by a gun battle, a chase on foot through speeding cars, and comic relief provided by Ming's partner. Things really heat up, though, when Tweedy's old boyfriend Prince, a psychotic killer, comes back to town...

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: You Shoot, I Shoot
programme.desc: Hong Kong is an over-crowded city, where people are easily provoked with confilcts. Hitman BART and assistant director CHUEN offer a bargain package 'YOU SHOOT, I SHOOT'.

E29 - Lemon Cafe
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck discover a Lemon Cafe in the park, but it seems to be nearly closing time...

programme.title: E43 - Den
programme.desc: Little Woo and Seamus call Stanley to help them build a den so they can watch the bugs in the forest without disturbing them. Stanley builds a giant, camouflaged den on legs.

programme.title: E6 - Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E14 - Juice
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `juice', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's orange juice, apple juice, tomato juice and sip-it-in-the-heat juice.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E36 - Go Jet Academy: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and the team are stuck inside, so Foz reads them his favourite book: Around the World in 80 Days by Jules Verne. The Go Jetters are soon imagining they are characters from the story.

programme.title: E5 - Shadowlands
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: E7 - Favourite Thing
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E41 - Bishop Rock Lighthouse, Isles Of Scilly
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E43 - Den
programme.desc: Little Woo and Seamus call Stanley to help them build a den so they can watch the bugs in the forest without disturbing them. Stanley builds a giant, camouflaged den on legs.

programme.title: E6 - Mini Bluey
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E8 - Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: E7 - The Pen Pal Badge
programme.desc: Duggee arranges for the Squirrels to write to some pen pals.

programme.title: E14 - Juice
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say `juice', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. There's orange juice, apple juice, tomato juice and sip-it-in-the-heat juice.

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E36 - Go Jet Academy: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and the team are stuck inside, so Foz reads them his favourite book: Around the World in 80 Days by Jules Verne. The Go Jetters are soon imagining they are characters from the story.

programme.title: E5 - Shadowlands
programme.desc: On a picnic in the park, Bluey and her friends play Shadowlands. Coco keeps taking shortcuts so Bluey has to show her that following the rules can make the game more fun.

programme.title: E7 - Favourite Thing
programme.desc: When Bluey accidentally makes Bingo upset playing a game at dinner, she will do anything to make her happy again - even changing the rules of the game. But nothing seems to work.

programme.title: E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E12 - The Waiting Badge
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E10 - Campfire Choir
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E26 - Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: E29 - Puppets
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo teach Unicorse good manners so he can ask Mum on a date, but things go awry when Unicorse eats a tick.

programme.title: E31 - Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: E17 - Three Peas In A Pod
programme.desc: Supertato and the Tato Team face a trio of Evil Peas when Mummy Pea and Daddy Pea come to visit Evil Pea. They vow to help her take over the supermarket once and for all.

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E25 - Ragdoll
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: E32 - The Voice Badge
programme.desc: When the Squirrels start talking to each other in the wrong voices it's clear something has gone awry. But Duggee has his voice badge. He knows what to do!

programme.title: E31 - The Stick Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels prepare for a campfire by collecting sticks of all sizes.

programme.title: E31 - Woolly Memories
programme.desc: Scarf Lady's old film reels get themselves in a tangle, so Sarah and Duck decide to recreate the footage.

programme.title: E7 - Unicorse
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: E8 - Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: E9 - Kuala Terengganu - Nyonya Ayam Buah Keluak
programme.desc: Guided by locals, the three hosts explore Kuala Terengganu to learn about the history, cuisine, and traditional attire of the Terengganu Peranakan Chinese community.

programme.title: E9 - Maldives
programme.desc: Sashi De journeys to the remote beauty of the Makunudhoo atoll, embarking on a culinary odyssey to uncover the vibrant heart of Maldivian gastronomy.

programme.title: E6 - Philippines - Home Cooked Food With Two Chinese Filipino Families
programme.desc: Chinese influences on Filipino food traces back to the 11th century with the interaction of trade,and is now deeply embedded in Philippine history,hearts and tastes.

programme.title: E20 - On The Mie Road
programme.desc: Our drive-in ramen trip took us to Mie Prefecture. We ordered Gomoku Ramen at Uneme Shokudo.

programme.title: E3 - Game Set Eat
programme.desc: Each episode a top celebrity gets a crash course in cooking from some of the best chefs in Malaysia so he or she can host a dinner for friends and families.

programme.title: Truth Or Fake[Live]
programme.desc: In our fast-moving challenging world it is of fundamental importance to sort what's true from what's fake online. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Rhino - Runaway
programme.desc: As the rhino bends to drink from a pool of water, his horn hits a rock that prevents his head from reaching down. This is the beginning of a annoying afternoon that involves getting some water. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: San Francisco
programme.desc: San Francisco highlights: Sailing under the Golden Gate, House of Air for slacklining and trampoline fun, Pier 39 to meet wild sea lions, and rooftop honey harvesting at Fairmont San Francisco. A week of diverse adventures with Nicole and local teens!

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Colossal Squid
programme.desc: Ant and Fontaine hunt for the rarest of ocean creatures, the colossal squid. But what happens when it turns out to be smarter than you?

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.title: The Pitmans: Martial Arts Dynamic Duo
programme.desc: Lisa and Chris Pitman are a married couple who hold the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most concrete blocks broken in thirty seconds by a mixed team of two. The couple shares what it takes to become the best in the world in martial arts.

programme.title: Space Disasters
programme.desc: Space travel is a dangerous business and that is never more apparent than when disaster strikes. Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the most prominent disasters in our journey through the cosmos, and what we learned from each set-back.

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.title: The Head Lice Vacumn Cleaner
programme.desc: The doctors do an experiment to prove that we have invisible ink inside our bodies. Dr. Xand sees head lice being removed from someone's hair with a vacumn cleaner. In the emergency room, someone has lost a piece of crayon in her ear.

programme.title: True Bromance
programme.desc: Artistic gymnasts Alice and Erin team up with trampolinists Morgan and Evie on a mission to save the planet. And Seb and Shakiem have a big competition looming, so they are having a motivational sleepover before heading to the British Tumbling Championships.

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: The Biggest Kite
programme.desc: Oto takes his cousin to the park, and the kids all build kites. When it gets windy, they realise the biggest kite isn't always the best.

programme.title: Ballgame
programme.desc: In antiquity, ballgame, the ancestor of basketball, was the favourite sport of Mesoamerican civilisations. There was nothing like this game to entertain the crowd and honour the gods. But cheats like Roach better beware... because the wrath of the gods is no joke!

programme.title: Hawk and the Poisoned Apples
programme.desc: The Evil Queen, aka SnowWhite's stepmother, is reformed, eager to redeem herself, and now is the new poisons teacher. Hawk and Rose have to convince the teachers the old lady is up to no good before completes her evil plan -- to kidnap Granny SnowWhite herself!

programme.title: What's so Great About Mould?
programme.desc: There are thousands of known species of mould, but they all feed off organic material and need moisture to survive. They play a vital role in returning nutrients back to ecosystems. One type, penicillin, has saved countless lives since it was used as an antibiotic.

programme.title: Old Math is New Again
programme.desc: In this episode we travel to ancient Egypt to explore an age-old multiplication method. How is this ancient method of multiplication, using ‘times two', similar to that used by modern computers? Eric will find out by conducting a range of fun experiments.

programme.title: True Bromance
programme.desc: Artistic gymnasts Alice and Erin team up with trampolinists Morgan and Evie on a mission to save the planet. And Seb and Shakiem have a big competition looming, so they are having a motivational sleepover before heading to the British Tumbling Championships.

programme.title: Venoms That Heal
programme.desc: Venomous animals such as cobras are dangerous but they could also help treat diseases. In this episode we show how researchers extract, identify, and classify 4,000 toxins from 203 different species. Are venom-based drugs really a potential cure?

programme.title: It's Snow Time!
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh, Kloe, and Beccy pack their bags and head to Latvia for an important international competition. But it's not all snowball fights and fun. Josh is moving into the senior category and has decided to attempt a new jump.

programme.title: What's so Great About Mould?
programme.desc: There are thousands of known species of mould, but they all feed off organic material and need moisture to survive. They play a vital role in returning nutrients back to ecosystems. One type, penicillin, has saved countless lives since it was used as an antibiotic.

programme.title: Could We Do Without Plankton?
programme.desc: Plankton are the foundations of the ocean food chain. Without them, pretty much nothing could survive. A single teaspoon of sea water can contain over one million living organisms.

programme.title: Tournaments
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, tournaments are all the rage! When Howler's behavior is interpreted of that as a crazed fan, he unwittingly finds himself in the shoes of a knight, embarking on a wild joust!

programme.title: Venoms That Heal
programme.desc: Venomous animals such as cobras are dangerous but they could also help treat diseases. In this episode we show how researchers extract, identify, and classify 4,000 toxins from 203 different species. Are venom-based drugs really a potential cure?

programme.title: Don't Cry This At Home
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand look at the cool bit of body kit that sucks your tears away when you cry, and Dr. Dan and Dr. Raph prepare for lift-off in a mind-boosting mission to space.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: King Penguin
programme.desc: Annabelle, the king penguin, is displaying some worrying symptoms. She's waving her head about skywards and Jorge is concerned she may have some neurological problems. Will Annabelle rejoin her friends on the great, icy mound at Loro Parque ever again?

programme.title: E16 - Free Philly
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

E9 - Satisfying Sleep Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E1 - Animals, Numbers, ABCs & More Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready to learn about animals, numbers, ABCs & more! Join Kii & Yii as they head to Old MacDonald's farm to learn all the sounds the animals make. Then it's time to learn numbers by singing along & counting the five cute penguins & five little ducks! The learning continues with a fun animal bus ride, a trip to space to sing 'Hey Diddle Diddle' & an important lesson on how to cross the road carefully with a mother cat & her kitten.

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Guide to Staying Healthy!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a guide to staying healthy & happy! The learning starts with hygiene, as JJ & his friends learn the importance of washing their hands & how to scrub-a-dub-dub in the bath. Then, it's time for some big milestones! Sing along as JJ learns to use the potty & TomTom learns what happens when you lose a tooth. Plus, join the Melon Patch kids as they visit the doctor for a checkup & learn that it's nothing to be afraid of!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E1 - When Arpo's Imagination Runs Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for adventure as Arpo's imagination runs wild! After a bump on the head, Arpo is convinced he's a pirate, leading the family on a swashbuckling adventure for treasure. Then, Arpo builds an epic backyard rollercoaster for Daniel, but it's up to Totbot to save the day when it goes out of control! The fantasy continues when Arpo accidentally creates a giant, sentient jelly monster that takes over the entire house & needs to be stopped!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a nature walk & some of his favorite rhymes! First, JJ's family shows him all the fun things we can do to help the Earth, like sorting trash for recycling. Then, the kids go on a nature walk with Bingo, collecting fun information in their scrapbooks! After the outdoor fun, it's time for classic rhymes. Sing along as ten animal friends try to share a bed & help the three little kittens who have lost their mittens!

programme.title: E8 - JJ's Nature Walk & Favorite Rhymes!

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: L'actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: L'actu:2025-2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: E34 - Scritch Scratch Dip And Splash!
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: E47 - Solderer
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: E18 - The Responsibility Chart
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: E52 - Dahut And Old Mummy
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada:2026
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E22 - Taming Legumes
programme.desc: On the menu: crumbled bacon and lentils, lemony lentil soup, fresh pasta with Italian sausages and haricot beans, homemade falafels, chickpea and chocolate biscuits.

programme.title: Parlons Eco:2026
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Meurtres A Font-Romeu
programme.desc: Font-Romeu is in shock: Father Baptiste has been murdered. Lieutenant Thomas Errelbaz investigates, but is out of his depth. Newly arrived from Paris, his colleague Julie Delpech is struggling to assert her authority. But she is convinced that a mysterious individual is settling their scores with the past.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E511 - School of Shock / Elecshunned
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts. // Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: E705 - Road Trip: Bizarritorium
programme.desc: When Mom is assigned a travel article at work, she takes the entire family on a cross country road trip. But the trip gets off to a bumpy start when Lincoln tries to change Mom's itinerary to go to Dr. Weirdly's Bizarritorium.

programme.title: E204 - Henry & The Woodpeckers
programme.desc: When Piper's basketball coach quits, Henry becomes the coach of Piper's team. As he tries to whip the team into shape, he is challenged by the League Board and its unorthodox rules.

programme.title: E101 - Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.desc: The Patrick Star Show is interrupted by a most peculiar stench. // Squidina hires an assistant who's a little too good at his job.

programme.title: E523 - Diss the Cook / For Sale by Loner
programme.desc: Lincoln is convinced the middle school lunch lady is holding a grudge against him and his older sisters. // Mr. Grouse attempts to find some peace and quiet after moving away from the Louds.

programme.title: E2 - Romania
programme.desc: Rooftop and Catfish’s travels take them to Romania, where the daredevil acts continue. After a chariot race in the countryside, the BMX bikers continue their attempt to become Romanian gladiators by flying through the air, jumping through flaming walls, and even lighting themselves on fire while riding their bikes. They get up close and personal with the sheep of the country, trying the Romanian delicacy of sheep’s head, but quickly move on to just milking the animal. Finally, the trip to this Eastern European country is not complete without trying to clean up the streets from Romania’s stray dog epidemic. Are Rooftop and Catfish able to save the strays or does the duo learn that they are all bark and no bite?

programme.title: E2 - Bangkok
programme.desc: It may be the backpacker's must-see, but if you go to the Venice of the East, don't drive!

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E1 - Secrets of the Great White Shark
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they’ve helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: E15 - Fricadelle With Samurai Sauce
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Laurence Grimonprez, an antique dealer and chef of Guadeloupean and Northern French origin, to her kitchen. She concocts a recipe for fricadelle, the flagship product of the North, accompanied by a samurai sauce with West Indian chilli and sweet potato pickles.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Boutillot/Redevelopment/Garden Of The Five Senses
programme.desc: Contents: Julien Boutillot, the market gardener who grows his vegetables to music; the challenges of rewilding forests; the Garden of the Five Senses in Yvoire; Don't panic: back to the retirement home.

programme.title: E27 - New Life For A Village House
programme.desc: Cedric and Virginie are in Rixensart to find out about the renovation of a beautiful family home.

programme.title: E7 - Musee Des Beaux-Arts Du Perigord/Tuan Tran/Schiaparelli
programme.desc: The Musee des Beaux-Arts du Perigord offers a rich and varied selection of works. In his studio, Tuan Tran combines the finesse of glass with the brutality of concrete. At Schiaparelli, masculine and feminine are confidently combined. Dive behind the scenes of D'Offard wallpaper production.

programme.title: E6 - Flying Over The Mountains
programme.desc: To learn more about backcountry skiing, Alexis and Thomas travel to Golden, British Columbia, where they experience two extremes: the luxury of heliskiing and the simple life of ''ski bums.''

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

E7 - Fun At The Museum/Bouncy Bridge Rhapsody
programme.desc: Shiro heads to a museum where he finds a dinosaur fossil! He can't find the Bobobobobone as there are too many bones. Will Shiro be able to get the Bobobobobone without being caught?

programme.title: E161 - The Spinoffs/The Transformation/The Understanding/The Ad/The Slip
programme.desc: Wishing to get rid of Gumball once and for all, his nemesis Rob offers up a variety of reality, action and comedy shows featuring characters other than Gumball. Unfortunately for Rob each one is worse than the last…

programme.desc: There’s easy money to be had in the art world and Mr. Bean is set on getting some of it.

programme.title: E1 - A. The Third/The Debt/The Pressure/The Painting/The Responsible
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin spice up their friendship by introducing a third best friend.

programme.title: E111 - Villains Vs Heroes/Strawberry On The Air
programme.desc: The epic battle between Dirk O, the Council of Comics, Mike and X unfolds at the city hall! Mike's potential explodes!

programme.title: E110 - All The Right Grooves/After The Break
programme.desc: Sam has sworn never to dance in front of anyone again! But Amber organizes a contest where everyone will have to dance. Sam asks for a power that will help her overcome this

programme.title: E112 - Serviceable Clone/Battle Of The Wits
programme.desc: Sam is really really really busy! She has things to do everywhere, with everyone, and everytime! And it's impossible to do everything at once … unless she can clone herself!

programme.title: E309 - Chaos Unchained
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: E111 - The Vase/The Ollie/The Sorcerer/The Outside/The Copycats
programme.desc: Sick of Granny Jojo's ugly gifts, Nicole encourages the kids to take matters into their own hands and 'accidentally' break her latest hideous vase. But when Gumball, Darwin and Anais try to destroy it, they discover it is more robust than it seems.

programme.title: E9 - Honeytrap
programme.desc: When a female robbery crew “honeytraps” and kills several rich VIPs, HONDO and 20-SQUAD are called in to assist FBI Agent Jackie Vasquez in capturing the dangerous fugitives before the death toll rises.

programme.title: E3 - Paymer Vs. Paymer

programme.title: E25
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.desc: A man stands up for his family and seeks revenge for the wrongs done towards his loved ones.

programme.title: E1134
programme.desc: Zoom In: Pay attention to current political topics, major social events and news hot spots. Dig out more facts and backgrounds. Analyze the early consequences of news events, the fate of characters, and present authoritative views.

programme.title: Phoenix Panorama
programme.desc: PHOENIX PANORAMA : To entertain, educate and inform audiences, Panoramic Eyeshot of Phoenix, a series of captivating and controversial documentaries, includes segments on current affairs, historical anniversaries and exclusive insider views on present developments.

NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.
PHOENIX FOCUS : Focusing on the global political issues and major social events. Phoenix focus delivers news highlights to viewers, presenting authoritative views.

programme.title: E155
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E472
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: E155
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.desc: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

programme.desc: Abby Phillip leads a roundtable discussion on the day's biggest stories and issues shaping our world.

programme.desc: Stay up to date with John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner from CNN's immersive news hub.

programme.desc: Zain Asher and Bianna Golodryga cover the top global and national issues of the day.

programme.title: Temporary Family
programme.desc: Lung is facing a serious situation in life. His girlfriend won't marry him unless he can buy her a 1000-sq ft apartment in one year's time...

programme.title: Love and the Grand Tug-of-war
programme.desc: A story of the sad love between a man who dedicates his youth to the nearly 420-year-old tradition of the Sendai Grand Tug-of-War, and a Korean medical resident who works on Koshiki island, and what happens with them and their families.

programme.title: Book of Love
programme.desc: Jiao Ye moved to Macau with her father when she was 15. She is a sassy casino worker who longs for love, but her life was hard. Daniel, a commitment-averse real estate agent in Los Angeles who specializes in selling properties to wealthy Chinese and father of a teenage son. Love blooms between the two as they start exchanging letters because of a book, they sharing their most personal and intimate self with each other.

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E276 -Atonement
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Twins Effect, The
programme.desc: Ace Vampire slayer Reeve and his new partner Gipsy are on this mission, however Reeve's younger sister Helen falls in love with the Vampire fifth prince Kazaf.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.desc: Meet a golden retriever that assuages anxiety and helps heal PTSD, a shepherd mix who rescues mudslide survivors, a pair of spaniels who sniff out underground water leaks, and a group of teacher’s pets in the UK that assist children learning to read.

programme.title: E4 - The Protectors
programme.desc: A blind woman has found a new lease on life thanks to her canine running mate, a Jack Russell works as a super-nanny to a surprising array of species, and a team of dogs in Kenya are on daily patrol protecting endangered rhinos from poachers.

programme.title: E3 - The Partners

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E2 - Escape to the Deep
programme.desc: Count down the seconds as the sun sets and predators prowl around the pool before the tide finally rolls in. Persevere as night falls with a kleptomaniacal slug and an acrobatic scallop, while a pair of sneaky crabs take a dangerous shot at romance.

programme.title: E4 - Bears on the Move
programme.desc: Beni and Lala are going stir crazy in the sick bay, but they must recover before returning to the rough and tumble of class. And at forest school, a termite-foraging lesson inspires class clown Valentino to make a finger-licking discovery.

programme.title: E3 - Aerial Hunters
programme.desc: Australia’s birds of prey are some of the region's fiercest predators. These highly specialised killers are powerful, resourceful and striking; they use some impressive weapons to survive. This is the story of Australia’s aerial hunters.

programme.title: E6 - Home Invasion
programme.desc: Respond to danger on a rural property with Mick and Adele, who brave a fired-up brown snake. Tread carefully as Jess and Dan extract a python from a play area, and get spooked when a chicken-hunting python squashes Liv’s hand during a tense rescue.

programme.title: E1 - Tropical Shores
programme.desc: Explore the shores of the Northern Territory and the abundant waters of the Great Barrier Reef. Face flooded roads, hungry saltwater crocs, and killer jellyfish as Lizzie investigates why so many strange, deadly creatures make this remote area home.

programme.title: E6 - California
programme.desc: The beaches of California are some of the most beautiful in the world, but are they falling out of balance due to mankind’s effects on nature? What does it take for the magnificent fauna of the Pacific Coast to keep living… on the “living beach”?

programme.title: E2 - Dilla’s Surprise
programme.desc: Crash a fruit-flinging party celebrating the return of Jelapat, Talaken, Bawan, and Rona to the nursery to join the rest of their classmates. Meanwhile, flooding overtakes the pre-release islands, and injuries stifle the progress of two students.

programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E2 - 涼山殘疾姑娘談求職困境
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。
